review_comment: Missing an `and` at the start of this line?
A static method can directly call another static method, hence `this.shouldBuildText` ought to work.
That was failing with lint, but seems to be fine now that I upgraded
I take that back, it fails because `this` doesn't exist because we're in the closure.
Sorry, didn't notice the closure; please disregard my comment :-)

Please remember to also update https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/blob/a936509b77ae4f7e49dea57cf2e2a0aacd062516/web/text_layer_builder.js#L440-L446 and https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/blob/master/web/interfaces.js accordingly,

Should we throw an Error if `this.enabled` here, or at the very least print a warning and return early, since multiple `enable`-calls (without `disable` between) seem like a bug elsewhere in the code-base?
Similar to the comment above, for the `enable`-method, but for the `!this.enabled` case instead.
We currently call disable without enabling since we cancel things out before starting. Since this is safe to call without enabling, I think we should just leave it as is.
Maybe just add a `if (!this.enabled) { return; }` at the top then, since none of the code in this method needs to run if it's already disabled?
